creator: johan@stromnet.se
text:
root@103amd64-default:~ # curl -V
curl 7.58.0 (amd64-portbld-freebsd10.3) libcurl/7.58.0 OpenSSL/1.0.1s zlib/1.2.8 nghttp2/1.29.0
Release-Date: 2018-01-24
Protocols: dict file ftp ftps gopher http https imap imaps pop3 pop3s rtsp smtp smtps telnet tftp 
Features: AsynchDNS IPv6 Largefile GSS-API Kerberos SPNEGO NTLM NTLM_WB SSL libz TLS-SRP HTTP2 UnixSockets HTTPS-proxy 


Difference in "protocols"
